title: CredentialManager getCredentialProviderServices zero-perm provider enumeration + cross-user + arbitrary userId
pattern: Missing permission check + cross-user parameter injection
notes: DEVICE CONFIRMED. getCredentialProviderServices(userId, providerFilter) has ZERO permission check and accepts arbitrary userId. Confirmed: (1) User 0 returns 3 Google credential providers with full ComponentName (GoogleIdService, RemoteService, PasswordAndPasskeyService) — no permission needed. (2) User 10 returns empty list but NO SecurityException — cross-user enumeration confirmed. (3) User 999 (non-existent) also returns empty list, no error. Also confirmed getCredentialProviderServicesForTesting(int) method exists. Impact: app profiling (which credential providers are enabled), cross-user privacy leak.
